title: Moderation update: spam and harassment handled
body: We reviewed the current abuse queue and took action on validated high-severity cases. spam_wave_42 was banned for phishing spam across 6 channels in 20 minutes. toxic_runner was banned for repeated targeted harassment against newcomers. report_006 was identified as a false positive tied to brigading against core_maintainer and was closed without sanction. Trusted members were not sanctioned.
